sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_dc4eedd42f3501108f98136a2799b6c4
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.createTranslationsSI</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><name>createTranslationsSI</name><script><![CDATA[var createTranslationsSI = Class.create();
createTranslationsSI.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {
    },
	
	rapidAPICall: function(){
		try{
            var userID = gs.getProperty('x_661539_update_0.userID');
            var password = gs.getProperty('x_661539_update_0.password');

			var requestBody = "";
            var previousURL = 'https://dev57364.service-now.com/api/661539/rapidapi/postTranslation/pt/gato';

            var request = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2();
            request.setEndpoint(previousURL);
            request.setHttpMethod('POST');

            request.setRequestHeader("Accept", "application/json");
            request.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');

            request.setBasicAuth(userID, password);
            request.setRequestHeader("Accept", "application/json");

            var response = request.execute();
            var responseBody = response.getBody();
            var httpStatus = response.getStatusCode();

            gs.log('response: ' + response);
        gs.log('responseBody: ' + responseBody);
        gs.log('httpStatus: ' + httpStatus);
}catch(e){
    gs.print('error: ' + e);
}
	},
	elementChoices: function(){
		var obj = elementChoices = [
{ id: '0', name: '---Please select---'},
{ id: 'acknowledgement_confirm_label',name: 'acknowledgement_confirm_label'},
{ id: 'action_name', name: 'action_name' },
{ id: 'answer', name: 'answer' },
{ id: 'cancel_label', name: 'cancel_label' },
{ id: 'caption', name: 'caption' },
{ id: 'category', name: 'category' },
{ id: 'child_descriptor', name: 'child_descriptor' },
{ id: 'compare_main_label', name: 'compare_main_label' },
{ id: 'confirm_label', name: 'confirm_label' },
{ id: 'confirm_problem', name: 'confirm_problem' },
{ id: 'data_source_label', name: 'data_source_label' },
{ id: 'description', name: 'description' },
{ id: 'display_name', name: 'display_name' },
{ id: 'display_value', name: 'display_value' },
{ id: 'empty_value', name: 'empty_value' },
{ id: 'example_text', name: 'example_text' },
{ id: 'field_value', name: 'field_value' },
{ id: 'format', name: 'format' },
{ id: 'header_label', name: 'header_label' },
{ id: 'headline', name: 'headline' },
{ id: 'help_tag', name: 'help_tag' },
{ id: 'help_text', name: 'help_text' },
{ id: 'hint', name: 'hint' },
{ id: 'initial_agent_response', name: 'initial_agent_response' },
{ id: 'instructions', name: 'instructions' },
{ id: 'items', name: 'items' },
{ id: 'label', name: 'label' },
{ id: 'layout_name', name: 'layout_name' },
{ id: 'link_label', name: 'link_label' },
{ id: 'lookup_name', name: 'lookup_name' },
{ id: 'm2m_from_label', name: 'm2m_from_label' },
{ id: 'm2m_to_label', name: 'm2m_to_label' },
{ id: 'mail_subject', name: 'mail_subject' },
{ id: 'menu_title', name: 'menu_title' },
{ id: 'mobile_title', name: 'mobile_title' },
{ id: 'name', name: 'name' },
{ id: 'parent_descriptor', name: 'parent_descriptor' },
{ id: 'phase_name', name: 'phase_name' },
{ id: 'placeholder', name: 'placeholder' },
{ id: 'plural_label', name: 'plural_label' },
{ id: 'question', name: 'question' },
{ id: 'question_text', name: 'question_text' },
{ id: 'question_translated', name: 'question_translated' },
{ id: 'reason', name: 'reason' },
{ id: 'second_level_text', name: 'second_level_text' },
{ id: 'section_header', name: 'section_header' },
{ id: 'short_description', name: 'short_description' },
{ id: 'short_name', name: 'short_name' },
{ id: 'subtitle', name: 'subtitle' },
{ id: 'text', name: 'text' },
{ id: 'title', name: 'title' },
{ id: 'tooltip', name: 'tooltip' },
{ id: 'translated_ending_state', name: 'translated_ending_state' },
{ id: 'translated_starting_state', name: 'translated_starting_state' },
{ id: 'translated_value', name: 'translated_value' },
{ id: 'ui_action_hint', name: 'ui_action_hint' },
{ id: 'value_override', name: 'value_override' }
	];
		return obj;
	},

    type: 'createTranslationsSI'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2022-02-16 22:13:46</sys_created_on><sys_id>dc4eedd42f3501108f98136a2799b6c4</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>createTranslationsSI</sys_name><sys_package display_value="CreateSNTranslations" source="ef4d73762f2101108f98136a2799b6d7">ef4d73762f2101108f98136a2799b6d7</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="CreateSNTranslations">ef4d73762f2101108f98136a2799b6d7</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_dc4eedd42f3501108f98136a2799b6c4</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2022-04-01 15:39:52</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_properties"><sys_properties action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><choices/><description>Enables Change Type Compatibility for Change Models if the com.snc.change_management.state.model plugin is installed. When true allows changes to be created with both the type based workflow and Change Models.</description><ignore_cache>false</ignore_cache><is_private>false</is_private><name>com.snc.change_management.change_model.type_compatibility</name><read_roles/><suffix>global</suffix><sys_class_name>sys_properties</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2020-12-15 16:56:56</sys_created_on><sys_id>c6d1e032c363101035ae3f52c1d3aedc</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>com.snc.change_management.change_model.type_compatibility</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Change Management - Change Models" source="com.snc.change_management.change_model">71a2b17a45d53010c0a05206e0e0f8c9</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_properties_c6d1e032c363101035ae3f52c1d3aedc</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2022-03-15 10:46:22</sys_updated_on><type>string</type><value>true</value><write_roles/></sys_properties><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=c6d1e032c363101035ae3f52c1d3aedc"/></record_update>
